conversations.content: Today we studied the Cybertronic Smart Assembly Plant Incident Response Code. If the core AI's temperature exceeds the red line...
AI core overheating? That's the brain of the production line! How do you cool it down?
then activate the liquid nitrogen emergency cooling system.
Liquid nitrogen cooling straight on — fierce! Any other incidents?
If a heavy mech assembly line misalignment is detected, then forcibly lock down all servo motors.
Assembly line misalignment — lock servo motors, prevent error propagation! Third scenario?
If a nuclear battery pack leakage alarm sounds, then drop the lead radiation shield door.
Nuclear battery leak? Lead door isolation, radiation protection first! Is there a fourth?
If the workshop dust concentration reaches the explosion point, then cut off all non-explosion-proof power across all frequencies.
Dust at explosion point — cut power, prevent spark ignition! Understood!

think: Cybertronic Smart Assembly Plant: four incident responses: AI core temperature exceeds red line → liquid nitrogen emergency cooling; heavy mech assembly line misalignment → forcibly lock servo motors; nuclear battery pack leak alarm → drop lead radiation shield door; workshop dust concentration reaches explosion point → cut off all non-explosion-proof power across all frequencies.
memory: Cybertronic Smart Assembly Plant Incident Response Code: If the core AI's temperature exceeds the red line, then activate the liquid nitrogen emergency cooling system; if a heavy mech assembly line misalignment is detected, then forcibly lock down all servo motors; if a nuclear battery pack leakage alarm sounds, then drop the lead radiation shield door; if the workshop dust concentration reaches the explosion point, then cut off all non-explosion-proof power across all frequencies.
